description: Effaced letter in which a man informs his mother that the power of attorney she gave him proved to be invalid. He urges her to go to ʿAllūn al-Ḥaver and obtain and send him a valid writ, issued by her and by Maḥfūẓ, which gives power of attorney to him, his brother and Abū Saʿīd ʿAmram b. Moshe ha-Levi. On verso there is the address in Arabic script. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב מטושטש שבו אדם מודיע לאמו שייפוי הכוח שנתנה לו התברר כלא-תקף. הוא מפצירה לפנות לעלון החבר ולשלוח לו ייפוי כוח תקף.
